heading: State contribution of funds for certain operation and maintenance costs
label: 701h–3 State contribution of funds for certain operation and maintenance costs
text: In carrying out eligible operations and maintenance activities within the Great Lakes Navigation System pursuant to in a State that has implemented any additional State limitation on the disposal of dredged material in the open waters of such State, the Secretary may, pursuant to , receive from such State, and expend, such funds as may be contributed by the State to cover the additional costs for operations and maintenance activities for a harbor or inland harbor within such State that result from such limitation.section 2238 of this titlesection 701h of this title
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of this title
